subject: Your USPS Retirement Application – Confirmation
body_preview: We have received your retirement application. Your last official duty day is January 12, 2024.

subject: RE: Retirement Forms – TSP Rollover Instructions
body_preview: Please find the SF-2818 and TSP-70 forms attached. Return completed copies by January 20.

subject: Congrats, Brother! Enjoy That Retirement
body_preview: John, we are all going to miss you on the route. You earned every bit of it. Congrats!

subject: RE: Farewell Luncheon – Friday at Noon
body_preview: Confirmed, John. Everyone is coming. Loretta is bringing her pecan pie.

subject: USPS Federal Employee Health Benefits – Retiree Continuation
body_preview: To continue your FEHB coverage into retirement, complete the attached form within 60 days.

subject: Retirement party – Baker gets his freedom
body_preview: Johnny! We are throwing something together Saturday evening. Bring Doreen.

subject: OPM Case No. 2024-RET-048821 – Interim Payment Schedule
body_preview: Your interim annuity payments will begin February 1, 2024. Expect 80% of estimated benefit.

subject: RE: TSP Account – Rollover to IRA Complete
body_preview: We have processed your TSP-70 request. Your rollover to the designated IRA is complete.

subject: Loretta's Farewell – She's Retiring Too!
body_preview: John, Loretta put in her papers last week. They are hosting a get-together March 15.

subject: FEHB – Health Insurance Card Enclosed
body_preview: Your retiree health insurance ID cards are being mailed to your address on file in Biloxi, MS.

subject: OPM – Final Annuity Computation Notice
body_preview: Your final annuity has been computed. Full benefit payments begin April 1, 2024. See enclosed statement.

subject: Checking In – How's Retired Life?
body_preview: John, hope you and Doreen are doing good. We had a rough July with the heat on the route. Miss you.

subject: RE: Checking In – How's Retired Life?
body_preview: Same here. Hot as fire out there. You picked the right time to go, Baker.

subject: USPS Retiree Newsletter – Summer 2024
body_preview: Inside: COLA update, open season reminder, and retiree dental plan changes for 2025.

subject: OPM – Annual Benefit Statement
body_preview: Your annual CSRS annuity benefit statement for calendar year 2024 is now available.

subject: Willie James – Memorial Service Saturday
body_preview: John, sad news. Willie James passed Monday. Service is Saturday at 10 AM at Greater Hope Baptist.

subject: FEHB Open Season – Action Required by Dec 13
body_preview: Open season is November 11 through December 13. Review your plan options and make any changes.

subject: OPM – 2025 COLA Notice
body_preview: Your CSRS annuity will increase by 2.4% effective December 1, 2024 due to cost-of-living adjustment.

subject: Loretta's New Email – Please Update Your Contacts
body_preview: John, I changed my email. Yahoo now. Hope you and Doreen are doing well down in Biloxi.

subject: USPS Retiree Newsletter – Winter 2024
body_preview: Holiday greetings from the USPS family. Updates on Medicare Part B premium changes and FEHB.

subject: OPM – 1099-R Tax Form Available Online
body_preview: Your 2024 Form 1099-R is now available in your OPM Services Online account.

subject: Merry Christmas from the Old Crew
body_preview: Merry Christmas, John. Darnell says hello too. Take care of yourself out there.
